privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task is a generative synthetic exercise requiring the creation of a new OpenClinica study from scratch. Verified that the expected study parameters (PK-HV-001, Healthy Volunteer PK Study, Dr. Alan Grant, InGen Therapeutics), event definitions (Dosing Visit, Safety Follow-up), and user role assignment (mrivera as investigator) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
